concepts.title: Half wave rectifier
concepts.conceptBody:
Half Wave Rectifier

When the P-N junction diode rectifies half of the ac wave, it is called half wave rectifier

concepts.title: Full wave rectifier
concepts.conceptBody:
Full Wave Rectifier

It rectifies both halves of ac input signal.

Ripple frequency : The ripple frequency of full wave rectifier = 2 × (Frequency of input ac )
